text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The season of scorching heat is here, announcing
the beginning of this year's summer camp!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What is synonymous with summer? The sun! And
what is synonymous with the sun? The Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Thus, the summer is my season! This year will bring forth the Overlord Nouveau!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've only just started and Opera O's already
lost me... I guess she has something new up her
sleeve.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Overlord Nouveau is, in other words, a whole
new me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An all-powerful me, the target of countless,
envious eyes...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall conquer them all en route to an
overwhelming victory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This is the Overlord Nouveau, for even the
Overlord must evolve.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh, hehehe... This ocean, is it not ideal for
acquiring more strength, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Swimming through rough waters and sprinting
across the sand... The beach presents an ideal
training environment for building up strength.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The forces of nature themselves shall grant me
new power. Yes, I can feel it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Poseidon will rise from the waves, bestowing
terrible power unto me! Bwaahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Apparently, she doesn't anticipate putting in
the work herself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No matter the course of events, I shall emerge as
a new being this summer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Something will happen. And if it doesn't, then I will make it happen!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So that I may become a lord who gains victory
with ease, no matter who or what pursues me!
